metadata.title: TimeBookingPro — Your bookings, handled.
metadata.description: TimeBookingPro builds AI voice agents that handle bookings and appointments for barbershops and small businesses — 24/7, automatically.
metadata.ogDescription: AI voice agents that handle bookings for your business — 24/7, automatically.
metadata.twitterDescription: AI voice agents that handle bookings for your business — 24/7, automatically.

footer.tagline: AI voice agents that fill your calendar — 24 hours a day.
footer.madeWithCare: Made with care for independent businesses.

cookieBanner.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyse site usage. By continuing, you agree to our

keyboardShortcuts.heading: Keyboard shortcuts
keyboardShortcuts.tip: Tip: press <kbd>?</kbd> any time to open this menu.

rows.before: Phone rings at 7 PM — you're mid-cut
rows.after: Agent picks up in under 2 seconds

pricing.subheadline: No setup fees. No contracts. Cancel any time.
pricing.microcopyHardCap: All plans include bookings synced to your calendar, a performance email, and all 7 supported languages. Minutes are a hard monthly cap — calls route to voicemail once the bucket is spent until the next billing cycle or an upgrade. You'll get email alerts at 25%, 50%, 75%, and 90% of your bucket so you're never surprised.
pricing.taxLine: {flag} Taxes shown for <bold>{country}</bold>{note}. Prices shown ex-VAT — tax calculated at checkout.

busy.name: Busy
busy.profile: High volume or a couple of locations — ~15 calls/day

heavy.name: Heavy
heavy.profile: Multi-location or very high volume — ~30+ calls/day

featureTips.minutes100: ~3 calls per day. Hard cap — voicemail takes over when the bucket is spent.
featureTips.minutes250: ~8 calls per day. Hard cap — voicemail takes over when the bucket is spent.
featureTips.minutes500: ~15 calls per day. Hard cap — voicemail takes over when the bucket is spent.
featureTips.minutes1000: ~30+ calls per day. Hard cap — voicemail takes over when the bucket is spent.
featureTips.calendarSync: Google, Outlook, Apple, and iCal — real-time two-way sync.
featureTips.performanceEmail: Bookings handled, minutes used, top call hours — sent straight to your inbox.
featureTips.languages: Greek · English · Spanish · Portuguese · French · German · Arabic. Agent locks to the caller's language on first substantive word.

calculator.subheadline: Adjust the sliders to match your business — see your real numbers instantly.

forWho.statCaption: of calls answered on the first ring

tabs.label: Barbershops
tabs.headline: Stop losing bookings while you're behind the chair
tabs.body: Every missed call is a missed haircut. Your agent answers instantly, checks your schedule, and locks in the appointment — so you can focus on the cut.
perks: Speaks the language your customers prefer

tabs.label: Salons
tabs.headline: A receptionist that never takes a day off
tabs.body: From colouring appointments to last-minute cancellations, your agent manages it all — without ever putting a customer on hold.

tabs.label: Spas
tabs.headline: Let your clients relax — starting from the first call
tabs.body: Your agent books treatments, answers questions about services, and handles rescheduling — so your team can focus entirely on the experience.

tabs.label: Nail & Beauty Studios
tabs.headline: Keep your chair full without lifting a finger
tabs.body: From gel sets to lash extensions, your agent knows your services and books the right slot with the right technician — every time.

tabs.label: Gyms & Studios
tabs.headline: Fill every class, every session
tabs.body: From personal training sessions to group classes, your agent keeps your timetable full and your members informed.

features.subheadline: One agent. Live 24/7. A calendar that fills itself.

cards.title: 24/7 availability
cards.body: Never sleeps, never takes a break. Your agent answers every call on weekends, nights, and holidays.

cards.title: Natural conversation
cards.body: Powered by advanced voice AI — sounds human, handles complex requests, understands context.

cards.title: Multilingual
cards.body: Greek, English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Arabic — 7 languages, auto-detected per caller.

cards.title: Direct calendar sync
cards.body: Bookings go straight into your calendar in real time. Zero double-bookings, zero manual entry.

howItWorks.subheadline: No complicated setup. No technical knowledge required. We handle everything.

steps.title: We set up your agent
steps.body: Tell us your business name, hours, and services. We build and train your personal AI agent in under 24 hours.

steps.title: It answers every call
steps.body: Your agent picks up instantly — day, night, and weekends. It speaks naturally, understands your customers, and handles any booking request.

steps.title: Your calendar fills up
steps.body: Bookings land directly in your calendar. You get a notification, your customer gets a confirmation. Zero effort on your part.

visualPanels.title: Call in progress
lines: Caller: 'Hi, I'd like a haircut + beard'

agentNamer.subheadline: Give your agent a name — or let AI generate one based on your business.
agentNamer.generateButton: Generate AI names for my business
agentNamer.errorTakingBreak: AI naming is taking a break — try again in a moment.
agentNamer.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach the name service. Check your connection.
agentNamer.previewUserBubble: Hi, I'd like to book a haircut this Saturday.
agentNamer.previewAgentReply: Hi! I'm {name} from {business}. We have Saturday at 10 AM and 2 PM available — which do you prefer?
agentNamer.easterEggHint: Try a different name for your actual agent ↑
agentNamer.phoneTagline: Handles calls 24/7 — even while you sleep

easterEggs.siri: Siri works for Apple. I work for you. Big difference. 📱
easterEggs.alexa: Alexa orders things. I book things. More useful. 🛒
easterEggs.cortana: Cortana got retired. I won't. I answer every call. 🪦
easterEggs.hal: I promise I won't lock any doors. 🚪
easterEggs.jarvis: Sir, your 10 AM is confirmed and your calendar is fully up to date. 🦾
easterEggs.friday: Online and at your service. All calls answered. 🤖
easterEggs.clippy: It looks like you're trying to book an appointment. Let me handle that. 📎
easterEggs.watson: Elementary, my dear client — your slot is available. 🔍

hero.typewriter: TimeBookingPro builds you a voice AI that answers calls, handles bookings, and fills your calendar — automatically, 24 hours a day.

bubbles: Hi! I'd like to book a haircut for tomorrow afternoon.
Of course! I have 2 PM and 4 PM free tomorrow. Which works best for you?

finalCta.subheadline: Join the businesses that book 24/7. Your AI agent will be live in under 24 hours.
finalCta.positionLine: You're <bold>#{position}</bold> in line — we'll reach out in order.
finalCta.checkEmail: Check your email — confirmation is on its way.
finalCta.errorMessage: Something went wrong — try again or email us at hello@timebookingpro.com
finalCta.finePrint: Live in 24 h · Unsubscribe any time
